mapper.select:
SELECT ips.id ,ips.security_code ,ips.security_short_name ,ips.adjuster_name ,ips.entry_time ,ips.target_pool_id ,p.pool_name AS target_pool_name ,ips.security_type ,dst.security_type_name ,mbp.id AS mySecurityPoolId ,bi.coupon_rate AS couponRate ,bi.issuer ,bi.full_name ,bi.firstissue_date AS issueDate ,bi.carry_date ,bi.maturity_date ,CASE WHEN bi.maturity_date IS NULL OR bi.maturity_date = '' THEN NULL WHEN bi.maturity_date >= CURDATE() THEN 'active' ELSE 'matured' END AS securityStatus ,bi.delist_date ,bi.repurchase_date FROM ip_pool_status ips LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON ips.target_pool_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sirm_securityinfo bi ON ips.security_code = bi.wind_code LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = ips.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN my_security_pool mbp ON ips.security_code = mbp.security_code AND mbp.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND mbp.status = 'use'
ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.audit_status = '20'
AND bi.maturity_date >= CURDATE()
AND bi.maturity_date < CURDATE()
AND ips.target_pool_id IN
#{pid}
AND ips.security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND ips.security_type = #{securityType}
AND ips.entry_time >= #{entryTimeStart}
AND ips.entry_time <= #{entryTimeEnd}
AND ips.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adjusterName}, '%')
AND bi.issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
AND mbp.id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ips.entry_time DESC ,ips.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ips.security_type ,dst.security_type_name FROM ip_pool_status ips LEFT JOIN dict_security_type dst ON dst.security_type = ips.security_type AND dst.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ips.is_deleted = 0 AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.security_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dst.sort_order ASC ,ips.security_type ASC
